title: PassManagerX
description: Tired of remembering passwords for different Minecraft servers and entering them every time you join? KPassManager handles all of that for you!
body:
# PassManagerX
Tired of remembering passwords for different Minecraft servers and entering them every time you join? KPassManager handles all of that for you!

## Features
- **Automatically log in** to servers after saving their passwords

- **Easy to use GUI** for managing passwords of servers

- **Simple commands** for setting password of a server

- **Made for 1.21 and above**

## Getting started 


To start saving passwords for servers, you have two options:

- Use the **GUI**, you can open it by clicking this button in the server settings (this is recommended).
  ![GUI Button location](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76fc56c7327f2017f1fa629ea1d47a43bebe14c5_0.webp)
- Join a server and enter "**/register <password> <password>**" or "**/register <password>**". The mod will then ask if you want to save this password for the server. You can confirm by entering "/save".
  ![Register example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a4570d2a6b245a08e43d1970d93c129f24e9fe5.png)

## IMPORTANT
**Never** share the file named "PassManagerX.json" with anyone else, as that contains all of your saved passwords for servers. It is present in the config folder of your .minecraft folder.

## Support

If you have any issues or questions about the mod, feel free to join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/QedXmBuQ8S) for assistance!
